message:
style(test): cargo fmt + silence unused-variable warnings in sync_cycle repro suite

Pure formatting / clippy cleanup on tests/repro_sync_cycle_fuzz_crashes.rs
introduced in ad9e1b7. No behavior changes.

Changes:
- Rustfmt rewraps: long format!() call on modified JSONL now uses a
  multi-line argument layout; vec! literal for the mangled binary payload
  wraps earlier; preflight_import() call collapses to the single-line
  form fmt prefers.
- Unused variables: rename jsonl_path -> _jsonl_path in
  repro_sync_cycle_corrupt_db (only the db_path is exercised) and
  beads_dir -> _beads_dir in repro_sync_cycle_hash_edge_cases (only the
  jsonl_path is exercised). Matches the -D warnings policy in AGENTS.md
  so `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` stays clean.
